name: BlueKCCommonRightFaxAPIStsHistLoad

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_src AS (SELECT comm.COMM_ID AS COMM_ID, comm.COMM_SRC_SYS_CD AS COMM_SRC_SYS_CD, comm.COMM_TRGT_SYS_CD AS COMM_TRGT_SYS_CD, comm.COMM_SENT_DTM AS COMM_SENT_DTM, comm.COMM_STTUS_CD AS COMM_STTUS_CD, comm.LAST_UPDT_DTM AS CRT_DTM, comm.COMM_SK AS COMM_SK, comm.COMM_STTUS_CMNT_TX AS COMM_STTUS_CMNT_TX, comm.COMM_TRNSMSN_CT AS COMM_TRNSMSN_CT, comm.CRT_USER_ID AS CRT_USER_ID, CAST(commhist.COMM_SENT_DTM AS varchar(50)) AS COMM_SENT_DTM_HIST FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_CommTrnsmsnOwner}.[COMM] comm LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_CommTrnsmsnOwner}.[COMM_HIST] commhist ON comm.COMM_SK=commhist.COMM_SK AND comm.COMM_SENT_DTM=commhist.COMM_SENT_DTM WHERE COMM_TYP_CD IN ('FAXSTS','FAXRQST','FAXDSPSTN')) SELECT cte_src.COMM_ID, cte_src.COMM_SRC_SYS_CD, cte_src.COMM_TRGT_SYS_CD, cte_src.COMM_SENT_DTM, cte_src.COMM_STTUS_CD, cte_src.CRT_DTM, cte_src.COMM_SK, cte_src.COMM_STTUS_CMNT_TX, cte_src.COMM_TRNSMSN_CT, cte_src.CRT_USER_ID FROM cte_src WHERE cte_src.COMM_SENT_DTM_HIST IS NULL
